name: Lucifer Morningstar||Om
description:
It's the sneezing season:D

This includes: Arson. Fire. And some angst.

This is based off a true story. Turns out, I might just be allergic to cats😭 and instead of it being a friend, it happened to my dad..but, he's alright thankfully<3

I sniffle and sneeze every time I play with that damn cat but I can't stop, he's too cute. And yes, he is a orange kitty and his name is goldilocks!

This is him, curled up on the floor.(he was purring LOUDLY.)

Another cat.picture.
creator: Lucifersboy
